posts.title: Test Post
posts.preview: Testing a post made directly from github to see if workflows will automatically update the metadata, subsequently posting this directly to the website with the correct date and tags.

posts.title: Site Reconstruction
posts.preview: After about 2 years of site inactivity, Finally got around to redoing the site. For a while I've wanted to abandon my [old site](https://github.com/Origamijr/CapitalistManifestoDesu), which was built using the Angular framework. That was mostly because it was built during an internship where I was using Angular. Over time, I've grown...
